subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Most Great Vision! That which thou hadst written was read in the gathering of the divine friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بمنظر اکبر آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی قرائت شد در انجمن یاران الهی ذکرت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
